children.text: that no State shall receive less than ¼ of 1 percent of the amount appropriated under for such fiscal year; andsection 9903(a) of this title

children.heading: Allotments in years with greater available funds
children.label: b Allotments in years with greater available funds

children.heading: Minimum allotments
children.label: 1 Minimum allotments
children.text: Subject to paragraphs (2) and (3), if the amount appropriated under for a fiscal year that remains after the Secretary makes the reservations required in exceeds $345,000,000, the Secretary shall allot to each State not less than ½ of 1 percent of the amount appropriated under for such fiscal year.section 9903(a) of this titlesection 9903(b) of this titlesection 9903(a) of this title

children.heading: Maintenance of fiscal year 1990 levels
children.label: 2 Maintenance of fiscal year 1990 levels
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not apply with respect to a fiscal year if the amount allotted under subsection (a) to any State for that year is less than the amount allotted under (as in effect on ) to such State for fiscal year 1990.section 9903(a)(1) of this titleSeptember 30, 1989

children.heading: Maximum allotments
children.label: 3 Maximum allotments
children.text: The amount allotted under paragraph (1) to a State for a fiscal year shall be reduced, if necessary, so that the aggregate amount allotted to such State under such paragraph and subsection (a) does not exceed 140 percent of the aggregate amount allotted to such State under the corresponding provisions of this chapter for the preceding fiscal year.

children.heading: Payments
children.label: c Payments
children.text: The Secretary shall make grants to eligible States for the allotments described in subsections (a) and (b). The Secretary shall make payments for the grants in accordance with .section 6503(a) of title 31

children.heading: Definition
children.label: d Definition
children.text: In this section, the term “State” does not include Guam, American Samoa, the United States Virgin Islands, and the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands.
